report_name: One Year Later: Omni Hotels Details $50M Recovery and Security Overhaul After Devastating Ransomware Attack

threat_actors.name: BlackSuit
threat_actors.description: The BlackSuit ransomware group was attributed to the catastrophic ransomware attack against Omni Hotels & Resorts in mid-2025, causing a nationwide operational shutdown and over $50 million in losses.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The BlackSuit ransomware group deployed its payload across Omni's internal systems, causing a week-long, system-wide outage of key systems including reservations, door locks, and point-of-sale (POS) systems.

malware.name: BlackSuit
malware.description: The BlackSuit ransomware payload was deployed across the Omni Hotels & Resorts network, leading to a system-wide outage and over $50 million in losses.

identities.name: Omni Hotels & Resorts
identities.description: A hotel and resort chain that was the victim of a catastrophic ransomware attack by the BlackSuit group in mid-2025, resulting in over $50 million in losses and a complete security overhaul.
